name: Maya Chen
bio: We met during our software engineering program and still trade travel plans, startup ideas, and book recommendations.

name: Liam Parker
bio: Former teammate from a product design sprint. We usually catch up about side projects and the latest gadgets.

name: Sofia Rahman
bio: Our weekend coffee chats turned into a great friendship built around photography walks and local food spots.

name: Noah Bennett
bio: My longtime workout partner who always remembers birthdays and somehow finds the best brunch places afterward.

name: Ava Martinez
bio: We organize local volunteer events together and usually check in after each monthly community drive.

name: Ethan Roy
bio: A close friend from high school. We still swap playlists and schedule short calls after new album releases.

name: Chloe Nguyen
bio: An early mentor who gives honest career advice and celebrates every win, no matter how small.

name: Daniel Brooks
bio: We reconnect through multiplayer game nights and quick voice notes about what to play next.
